title: Enough
content: There's a story about two friends at a billionaire's party. One says, 'You know what I have that he'll never have?' 'Enough.' Defining enough changes everything.
ssml_content: There's a story about two friends at a billionaire's party. One says, 'You know what I have that he'll never have?' <break time="300ms"/>'Enough.' <break time="200ms"/>Defining enough changes everything.
